compose_diagnostics.page_title: Elon Musk on X: "Grok video games are going to be incredible" / X
compose_diagnostics.compose_text_preview: Elon's excitement for Grok games is clear. But the core tension with advanced AI isn't just about what it can create, but how it makes us doubt what's real. When AI makes things *this* real, trust in evidence shifts.
alerts: Something went wrong, but don’t fret — let’s give it another shot.
